jobs.startJobBody: Are you ready to start this scheduled job now?
jobs.postedTasksSubtitle: Track approval, edit pending work, and manage your service requests.
jobs.firstTaskHint: Post your first task and it will appear here for tracking.
jobs.taskTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Fix leaking pipe in kitchen
jobs.locationHint: This helps us show nearby professionals
jobs.successSubtitle: Your task has been sent to our admin team for verification. Professionals will see it once approved.
jobs.taskPostedSubtitle: Your task has been sent to our admin team for verification. Once approved, professionals in your area will be able to see and quote on your task.
jobs.taskApprovalNotification: You'll receive a notification once an admin approves your task.
jobs.publishFailed: Failed to publish task. Please try again.
jobs.searchJobsPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or location...
jobs.noJobsFound: No jobs found matching your search.
jobs.jobsAppearAssigned: Jobs will appear here once assigned
jobs.manageJobsSubtitle: Manage your jobs and track progress
jobs.alreadyAppliedBody: You have already applied for this task.
jobs.needCoinsToApply: You need {{count}} credit(s) to apply for this task.
jobs.proposalSentBody: Your proposal has been sent to the client.
jobs.proposalSecure: Your proposal is private and secure
jobs.applyCoinNotice: Apply for this task? You need {{count}} credit(s) available, but credits are deducted only if the client selects you.
jobs.budgetHint: Enter the amount or range you are willing to pay
jobs.photosHint: Add photos to help professionals understand better
jobs.maxPhotosHint: You can add up to {{count}} photos
jobs.detailsTip: The more details you provide, the better quotes you'll receive.
jobs.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain in detail what you need done...
jobs.descriptionHint: Include as much detail as possible
jobs.whatNeedsDoneSub: Describe the specific outcome you expect from the professional.
jobs.whatNeedsDonePlaceholder: e.g. Detect the leaking pipe, fix or replace the damaged part, and ensure no more leaks.
jobs.whatNeedsDoneExample: e.g. Install a new water heater, fix broken plumbing, paint entire living room...
jobs.importantDetailsSub: Add constraints, access notes, urgency, measurements, or special instructions.
jobs.importantDetailsPlaceholder: e.g. The leak is under the kitchen sink. Please bring tools and call before arriving.
jobs.importantDetailsExample: Mention the issue, size, urgency, and anything the professional should know.
jobs.taskScopeSub: Explain how large the job is so providers can quote correctly.
jobs.taskScopePlaceholder: e.g. Small repair, one kitchen sink only, should take less than two hours.
jobs.professionalMaterialsSub: I want the professional to provide materials
jobs.infoSecure: Your information is secure and private
jobs.invalidDateFormat: Please enter the date as YYYY-MM-DD.
jobs.invalidDateFuture: Please choose today or a future date.
jobs.invalidTimeFormat: Please enter the time as HH:MM.
jobs.locationPermissionBody: We need location permission to get your current location.
jobs.locationFailed: Unable to get your location. Please try again.
jobs.budgetMinMax: Minimum budget cannot be higher than maximum budget
jobs.photoPermissionBody: Please allow photo access to upload task images.
jobs.photoUploadFailed: Could not add this photo. Please try again.
jobs.chooseProviderBody: Do you want to choose {{name}} for this task? One credit will be deducted from your wallet.
jobs.providerSelectedBody: {{name}} has been assigned to your task.
jobs.completeAndFinalizeBody: Is the task done? This will finalize the payment.
jobs.reviewSubmitFailed: Failed to submit review. Please try again.
jobs.rateExperience: How would you rate this experience?
jobs.reviewPlaceholder: Tell us more about your experience...
